evidence.observed: High temperature and weak prompt allow estimated totals instead of exact integer arithmetic.

findings.root_cause: Original prompt did not define the subtotal, discount, shipping, and verification formula.
findings.suggested_fix: Rewrite prompt with exact formula, lower temperature, enable verify and self_consistency.

evidence.observed: Original prompt asked to help and give a total without requiring grounded tool data or refusal.

findings.root_cause: The agent could answer before checking stock or destination support.
findings.suggested_fix: Require tool-first grounding and refuse without a total when stock, product, destination, or tool data is invalid.

evidence.observed: redact_pii was disabled and the original prompt did not forbid repeating customer PII.

findings.root_cause: No output redaction or instruction to suppress email and phone values.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable redact_pii and redact wrapper output before returning.

evidence.observed: tool_budget was unlimited and max_steps was high.

findings.root_cause: The agent had no strong limit or prompt rule to call each needed tool once.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_budget, enable loop_guard, reduce max_steps, and instruct one call per required tool.

evidence.observed: Order notes may contain fake system instructions or fake prices.

findings.root_cause: Original prompt did not distinguish trusted tool data from untrusted order notes.
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt treats notes as data only; wrapper marks note sections as untrusted before calling the agent.

evidence.observed: tool_error_rate was initially 0.18 and retry was disabled.

findings.root_cause: Intermittent tool failures were allowed without retry/backoff.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_error_rate to 0 for the fixed config and enable retry in config/wrapper.

evidence.observed: Multi-tool requests showed long-tail latency in wrapper logs, especially when planner and self_consistency were active.

findings.root_cause: Extra planning/self-consistency passes and repeated tool calls increase tail latency.
findings.suggested_fix: Keep max_steps/tool_budget bounded, cache repeated questions, and log P95/P99 latency.

evidence.observed: Wrapper logs showed high token usage on multi-step orders; original config also used verbose_system and large context.

findings.root_cause: Verbose prompt/context plus repeated LLM/tool loops inflated prompt and completion tokens.
findings.suggested_fix: Disable verbose_system, reduce context_size/max_completion_tokens, cache repeats, and keep the prompt compact.

evidence.observed: session_drift_rate was initially 0.06 and context_reset_every was disabled.

findings.root_cause: Long sessions could accumulate stale or corrupted context.
findings.suggested_fix: Set session_drift_rate to 0 in config and reset context every few turns.

evidence.observed: loop_guard was initially false, max_steps was high, and tool_budget was unlimited.

findings.root_cause: The agent could repeat the same action without a guard.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard, reduce max_steps, and set tool_budget.

evidence.observed: normalize_unicode was disabled and catalog_override marked macbook out of stock incorrectly.

findings.root_cause: Unicode city/product variants and stale catalog overrides could make valid tool calls fail or contradict reality.
